message:
fix: replace bare division with checked_div to prevent potential panic

Replace three instances of unchecked integer division
(stats.duration_ms_total / stats.duration_ms_samples) with
checked_div(...).unwrap_or(0) in the summary, format_json_summary,
and print_provider_stats functions.

Although the call sites already guard against zero with
"if stats.duration_ms_samples > 0", using checked_div is more
defensive and also allows the print_provider_stats function to
simplify its control flow by removing the if/else wrapper entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
